This issue affects the function mlflow.data.digest_utils of the file mlflow/data/digest_utils.py of the component Dataset Digest Computation. This manipulation causes use of weak hash. It is possible to launch the attack on the local host. The attack is considered to have high complexity. The exploitability is assessed as difficult. The exploit has been published and may be used.
